title: MATANA 20 Large Aluminium Foil Platters, 14" (35x26cm) – Disposable & Reusable Serving Trays with Raised Edges & Extra Depth – Oven & Freezer Safe Buffet Platters for Party Food, Christmas & Catering
features: Generous 35 x 26 cm platters – Large oval surface gives plenty of room for sandwiches, BBQ meats, salads, canapés and desserts, making these trays ideal for buffets, parties, Christmas dinners and catering.
Raised edges & greater depth – The deeper design with rolled, raised rim helps keep sauces, juices and toppings securely on the tray, reducing spills on your table or buffet.

Sturdy base for reliable serving – Made from thick aluminium foil with a reinforced bottom, these trays feel stronger than standard foil platters and help reduce bending when carrying typical buffet dishes.
Oven- & freezer-safe, water/oil/grease resistant – Suitable for hot and cold food, the platters can go from freezer to oven and handle roasts, dressings and marinades without falling apart.

Reusable or recyclable value pack – Each set includes 20 stackable trays that can be lightly rinsed and reused when desired, or easily recycled afterwards – perfect for home use, events and professional catering.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎BPA Free, Freezer Safe, Heavy Duty, Oven Safe, Reusable
